/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Duck.dir/src/audio/SoundEffectPlayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Duck.dir/src/audio/miniaudio_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Duck.dir/src/core/App.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Duck.dir/src/core/AppGameplay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Duck.dir/src/core/AppRender.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Duck.dir/src/core/DuckGameplay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Duck.dir/src/core/HunterGameplay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Duck.dir/src/core/Input.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Duck.dir/src/core/SceneLayout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Duck.dir/src/core/Timer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Duck.dir/src/core/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Duck.dir/src/game/DuckSpriteAtlas.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Duck.dir/src/game/HunterSpriteAtlas.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Duck.dir/src/game/HunterSpriteData.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Duck.dir/src/game/NatureSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Duck.dir/src/game/SpriteAnimation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Duck.dir/src/gfx/AtmosphereRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Duck.dir/src/gfx/EnvironmentAtlas.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Duck.dir/src/gfx/VulkanContext.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Duck.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o Duck.app/Contents/MacOS/Duck  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/glfw/lib-arm64 -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation -framework CoreGraphics -framework ImageIO -framework QuartzCore /usr/local/lib/libvulkan.dylib /usr/local/glfw/lib-arm64/libglfw.3.dylib
